Module 5:
Over-the-shoulder Real Life
Example - The Brilliant
Recalls Launch
!
Executive Summary
!
• 	Let’s now look at Susan Garrett's launch
• 	Susan Garrett is a dog agility trainer
• 	Susan's list is under 20,000 people
• 	To my knowledge this is one of the most successful internal launches
ever
• 	Susan joined Product Launch Formula in 2008
• 	She had no list.
• 	She relied entirely on hope marketing
• 	She's very, very highly accomplished as a dog trainer with national
titles and world titles in that very small dog agility market
• 	In the very first month at Product Launch Formula she did a $27,000
launch
• 	In the next year her business grew by 640%
• 	This is one of the most successful internal launches I have ever heard
about - remember I've been teaching this since 2005
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

This is PLC #1 of Susan Garrett’s Brilliant Recalls course
• 	She builds her authority through teaching - there’s a lot of value
delivered this way
• 	0:07 - She makes a big promise
• 	0:24 - She introduces her big why
• 	1:00 - “Clarity creates confidence” - and confidence comes through
education
• 	Begins teaching
• 	6:20 - Power of story
• 	Tells a very relevant story and makes the point (this is critical - don’t
leave the viewer to assume)
• 	11:00 - Creates more likeability and admits that she isn’t perfect
• 	13:00 - At this mark she begins to agitate about dealing with unwanted
behavior
• 	Really takes the time to build up the pain of not training your dog
• 	14:00 - Talking about investment and payoff
• 	14:50 - Big promise
• 	16:50 - Winning investment
• 	Definitely watch this section - builds up a big promise that the course
will deliver on
• 	16:59 - Here she starts to foreshadow the next video
• 	17:16 - The big why and community building
• 	18:04 - CTA - Asks for community to share the link and asks for
comments on video
!
